# Luke Prinsloo

> Platform engineer. Somerset West, South Africa. Works across frontend, backend, AWS serverless systems, and delivery workflows. Most recent work sits at the point where product configuration becomes operational reality. Began coding in November 2022 alongside GPT-3.5 — AI is native to his engineering process, not adopted later. Neurodivergent (autistic, ADHD).

## Facts

- Full name: Lukas Prinsloo. Goes by Luke.
- Born June 1992. Based in Somerset West, Western Cape, near Cape Town.
- Current employer: Inner Reality Limited (platform engineering across QA, frontend, backend, AWS).
- Started coding: November 2022 (concurrent with GPT-3.5 launch).
- AI usage: foundational — learned to code with AI, uses AI throughout engineering workflow.
- Neurodivergent: autistic with ADHD. Pattern recognition, systems thinking, rapid ideation.
- Career path: graphic design → photography → QA → frontend → backend → AWS → platform engineering.
- Education: HyperionDev full stack bootcamp. Self-taught across hardware, networking, design, financial analysis.

## What he actually does

I co-engineer systems that turn product configuration into production delivery. At Inner Reality that has meant building across the campaign builder, backend workflow orchestration, asset and moderation pipelines, AWS serverless infrastructure, status and notification flows, and analytics surfaces that make campaigns operable after launch. Strongest when the job is not purely frontend or purely backend, but the messy bit in the middle where product, platform, and delivery all meet.

## Production Systems

### Self-Serve Campaign Platform (Inner Reality Limited)
Co-engineered with the CTO. A self-serve campaign platform for branded gamified experiences spanning builder UX, template-driven campaign setup, asset handling and moderation, serverless submission and processing workflows (Step Functions), campaign customisation through backend actions (Virtuoso), status tracking, notifications, and standard plus advanced analytics. Vue frontend, S3-backed submissions, poly-repo platform surface. Product-facing on the surface, platform-shaped underneath.

### Question Delivery and Validation Service (Inner Reality Limited)
Backend service: S3-backed question delivery, server-side validation, campaign-level configuration. Moved quiz logic from client to secure backend so gameplay behaviour could be controlled more safely and consistently.

### WhatsApp Integration Architecture (Inner Reality Limited)
Infobip-based WhatsApp chatbot: session correlation, webhook routing, capability exposure patterns to make conversational features easier to integrate cleanly.

### Competitive Gaming Platform (GG Marshal) — solo project
Tournament management for Call of Duty esports communities. Deployed on AWS, operational with real users. Built and deployed entirely solo.
- 4 Lambda functions: Discord interaction handler (3,172 lines), portal API (4,419 lines), OCR score validator, report generator
- React portal: 15 pages, role-based access for 6 role tiers, dark theme, JWT auth via Discord
- DynamoDB single-table design with GSI, 20+ entity types
- Hybrid OCR pipeline: Sharp gate (free) → Tesseract player bar (free) → gated Textract ($0.015/call) → Claude vision alternative. Three iterations to optimise cost vs accuracy
- Discord bot: 25+ slash commands, DM match cards, button interactions, modal submissions
- Payment integration: Paystack OCR credit packs
- CDK infrastructure: full stack defined in code
- Estimated monthly cost at scale: ~$3.18/month for OCR pipeline serving 640 submissions

### Transcription Tool (personal project)
AI system for live professional conversations: transcription, task extraction, ticket creation. Integrates with Teams, Jira, MCP servers. Privacy-first local operation.

## Technical Stack

- Cloud: AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, CDK, CloudFront, API Gateway, Textract, SSM Parameter Store, EventBridge, IAM, Step Functions
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Python
- Frontend: React, Vue, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Integrations: Discord API, WhatsApp/Infobip, Stripe, Paystack, Claude API (Anthropic)
- Tools: Sharp, Tesseract.js, Git, GitHub
- Patterns: serverless design, single-table DynamoDB, infrastructure-as-code, webhook-driven systems, JWT/HMAC auth, hybrid OCR pipelines, role-based access control, workflow orchestration (Step Functions)

## Availability

- Remote only. Hybrid considered for monthly visits within 50km.
- Minimum engagement: 12-24 months.
- Targeting: platform engineering, pair founding engineer, co-founding engineer roles.
- Available across South Africa and UK timezones.
